name: Herb Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix well until fully incorporated.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for several hours or overnight to allow flavors to develop.
4. Before serving, give the dip one final stir.
5. Makes about 2 cups.
6. This recipe is even more delicious when made with fresh herbs instead of nonfat yogurt.
Note: Per 1/4 cup serving:
- 61 Kcal
- 0.8g fat (0g sat fat)
- 13% CFF
- 80mg Na
- 2.1g PRO/0.8g FAT/10.3g CHO
